title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: AI currently struggles to reliably edit Word documents compared to humans because .docx files have complex internal structure and logic similar to software. While computers can operate at scale, humans remain better at ensuring changes don't cause unintended consequences in document structure.
